creator: dikshie@sfc.wide.ad.jp
text:

 MASTER_SITES=  CPAN
--- distinfo.orig       2008-10-12 15:47:57.000000000 +0900
+++ distinfo    2008-10-12 15:48:57.000000000 +0900
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@

-SHA256 (IP-Country-2.23.tar.gz) = 2c16f478c4231a45a44223d545f4b690e2d281cae2cdf188ee2bf59bd79c5caf
-SIZE (IP-Country-2.23.tar.gz) = 167797
